title: Awareness & Context Setting
goal: Create shared understanding and urgency for change
keyAreas: High-level end-to-end process overview and what is changing vs. staying the same
Business drivers: service, cost, and efficiency
Importance of data in decision-making and awareness of current data challenges
Purpose of the new tool(s) and their role in the system landscape
Introduction to the new operating model and high-level role changes
behaviors: Asks 'why are we doing this?' and listens actively

title: Conceptual Understanding
goal: Build foundational knowledge across process, data, tools, and organization
keyAreas: L2/L3 process flows, key decisions, outputs, and cross-functional dependencies
Key data objects, data flows across systems, and data ownership
Core tool functionalities, system integrations, and input/output logic
Roles and responsibilities (RASCI), governance structure, and planning cadence
behaviors: Connects process, data, tools, and roles into a coherent picture
Asks 'what does this mean?' and forms a clear mental model

title: Practical Application
goal: Enable execution in real-life scenarios through role-based, hands-on learning
keyAreas: Detailed L4 activities, step-by-step execution, and exception handling
Data entry, validation, quality checks, and impact of incorrect data
Hands-on system training, role-based workflows, and scenario simulations
Role-specific responsibilities, cross-functional collaboration, and escalation paths
behaviors: Learns by doing in role-based and scenario-driven exercises
Asks 'how do I do this correctly?' and practices execution

title: Embedded Adoption
goal: Anchor new ways of working in daily operations as business as usual
keyAreas: Standardised execution, KPI tracking linked to process steps, and fixed planning cadence
Trusted and standardised data with governance embedded in daily work
Tool as system of truth, integrated into daily workflows, reducing workarounds
Role ownership, performance management alignment, and active governance
behaviors: Works consistently and independently within new ways of working
Takes ownership and steers on performance

title: Optimization & Continuous Improvement
goal: Drive continuous improvement and move from adoption to best practice
keyAreas: Continuous improvement loops, scenario planning integration, and cross-functional optimisation
Advanced data usage (predictive, prescriptive) and data-driven decision-making culture
Advanced tool features (AI, automation, simulations), model tuning, and increased utilisation
Development of SME capabilities, community of practice, and continuous learning culture
behaviors: Coaches others and leads continuous learning
